default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1348](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1348): Added support for fetching target resources by project ID (by @MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1345](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1345): Removed library deduplication mechanism due to impact on game launch (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1346](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1346): Some features not working after enabling R8 obfuscation (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1349](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1349): MC 26.2-pre-4 failing to launch due to missing LWJGL functions (by @MovTery)

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- [GP#1348](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1348)：支持通过项目 ID 获取目标资源 (by @MovTery)


## 修复：
- [GP#1345](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1345)：因影响游戏启动，移除库去重机制 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1346](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1346)：启用 R8 混淆导致的部分功能不可用 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1349](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1349)：LWJGL 缺失函数导致 MC 26.2-pre-4 无法启动 (by @MovTery)
